items.title: Research Assistant — Social Network Research
items.description: Collected and coded social media data for a research project examining the use of search engines to propagate the consumption of low-quality information.

items.title: Student Researcher — AP Research: Investment Analysis
items.description: Designed and executed an original study comparing the effectiveness of fundamental vs. technical investment analysis. Presented findings to an AP Research-certified panel and produced a full academic paper and literature review.

items.title: Group Leader and Volunteer Tutor
items.description: Led a delegation of 20 U.S. participants as senior student on a two-week immersion trip to Taiwan. Tutored Taiwanese middle schoolers via weekly Zoom sessions and coordinated lesson plans with local faculty. Developed Mandarin conversational fluency through immersion, earning the California Seal of Biliteracy.

items.title: Team Captain, Varsity Golf
items.organization: Athletic Leadership Council, El Toro High School
items.description: Organized team strategy, served as liaison between coaching staff and team, and mentored underclassmen.

items.title: Member and Volunteer Tutor
items.organization: National Honors Society / Math Honors Society
items.description: Tutored peers in math and core subjects at El Toro Public Library and El Toro Innovation Center. Provided academic support to ESL students, athletes, and demerit-recovery students.

items.title: Languages
items.description: Mandarin Chinese (California Seal of Biliteracy), Indonesian (beginner).

items.title: Interests
items.description: Piano (level 10 candidate), taekwondo (black belt), golf, investing.
